case_title: TANG, MALEE VS WILSON, MARC et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY TANG, MALEE AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON, MARC TRI REALTORS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-20-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL TO WILSON MARC TRI REALTOR RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TANG, MALEE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILSON, MARC $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,020.00, DEFT WAS RESPONSIBLE FOR ALL ITEMS IN SALE OF BLDG PLTF IS ENTITLED TO TERMS OF AGREEMENT FOR PURCHAS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT WILSON, MARC
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 23735, RECORD TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TANG, MALEE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WILSON, MARC JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 23735 ON 5-11-95. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
